JURY FINDS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY. JURY POLLED BY CLERK AT REQUEST OF DEFENSE. VERDICT IS UNANIMOUS. JURY THANKED AND EXCUSED, ADMONISHMENT LIFTED. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PROFFERING PARTIES. DEFT TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
